exa.note: Recommended for company research, people search, public-web source discovery, evidence fetches, and structured lead generation. Add an x-api-key header in host MCP config for production limits. GTM Agent intentionally does not redeclare Memory Store MCP; install memory-store@mem-plugins once for that.

websets.note: Recommended for persistent company/person sourcing, criteria verification, enrichments, imports, refreshes, and exports. Replace YOUR_EXA_API_KEY in host MCP settings with a real Exa API key before expecting Websets tools to connect.
